display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
1. Assess Damage
Identify affected entities
and time range

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. Verify Hash-Chain Integrity
Walk AuditLog backward:
entry[N].previousHash === entry[N-1].hash

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
3. Find Corruption Point
Identify first tampered
or invalid entry

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🚨 ALERT: Tampering Detected
Chain break at entry #X
Notify system owner

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4. Load Last Valid Snapshot
Query EventSnapshot
WHERE version < corruption_version

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5. Replay Events
Re-apply Event records
from snapshot.version + 1
to latest valid event

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
6. Rebuild Materialized State
Update EventSnapshot
with replayed state

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
7. Validate Rebuilt State
Compare checksums
Run integrity tests

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
8. Restore Service
Clear maintenance mode
Notify stakeholders

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
9. Manual Intervention
DBA review required
Supabase PITR fallback

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
10. Post-Incident Review
Update AuditLog with
RECOVERY event
Generate incident report

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
